---
title: Costs and Getting Access
---

## How to get access
### Existing project folder
Ask the owner of the project folder to invite you.

### New project folder
A new Research Drive projectfolder can be requested via the form on 🔒 [ServiceNow](https://services.vu.nl/esc?id=sc_cat_item&sys_id=39d345f097066990e553359fe153af01). Please note that because there can be costs involved (see below) you need to supply a budget code.

Once the projectfolder is created you can invite internal and external collaborators yourself.

## Are there costs involved?
The costs of storing data in Research Drive are detailed in the [Research and Archiving Storage Cost Model](https://rdm.vu.nl/topics/cost-model.html).
